name: skill-builder
description: When user wants to create a new Skill, or EVOLUTION.md Level 4 proposal auto-generates a new Skill
intent: Guide the user through creating a compliant Forge Skill — scaffolds files, validates structure, and ensures metadata consistency for the Skills ecosystem
author: ReqForge

when: User requests creating a new skill
Evolution engine outputs a new skill proposal
User wants to extend the framework

commands.name: skill-builder
commands.description: Create a new Forge Skill with consistent structure
